query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(contractors) > 0 AND NOT (JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 1 AND JSON_EXTRACT(contractors, '$[0].name') = 'Unknown') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_contractors,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NULL OR JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 0 OR (JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 1 AND JSON_EXTRACT(contractors, '$[0].name') = 'Unknown') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_contractors
FROM projects 
WHERE lifecycleStatus IN ('active', 'awarded')

  SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NULL OR JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 0 OR (JSON_LENGTH(contractors) = 1 AND JSON_EXTRACT(contractors, '$[0].name') = 'Unknown') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_contractors
FROM projects
